purpose: Reference codes with known consolidation history, run with the best model (V3_PRODUCT.md §6). The pilot passes only if winners rank above melters and melters are caught by the terminal-value gate. A Sonnet run of the same codes serves as the fleet-quality benchmark.

codes.title: Insurance Agencies and Brokerages
codes.rationale: Canonical PE roll-up: decades of documented brokerage consolidation (MarshBerry data), wide buy/exit spread.
codes.expected: high B and M; verdict green-tier

codes.title: Plumbing, Heating, and Air-Conditioning Contractors
codes.rationale: Massive current HVAC consolidation wave; physical service, AI-durable demand.

codes.title: Offices of Dentists
codes.rationale: DSO wave is long-documented. Also the v2 target-fitting case — a clean re-score is itself the test.

codes.title: Veterinary Services
codes.rationale: One of the largest PE waves of the 2010s-20s (deep-dive exists in repo).

codes.title: Funeral Homes and Funeral Services
codes.rationale: The classic historical roll-up (SCI). AI value low but roll-up mechanics proven.
codes.expected: high B/M, low V — verdict mid-tier, not KILL

codes.title: Home Health Care Services
codes.rationale: Active consolidation, Mertz Taggart multiple data (deep-dive exists in repo).

codes.title: Exterminating and Pest Control Services
codes.rationale: Rollins/Terminix/Rentokil: proven route-density roll-up economics.

codes.title: Car Washes
codes.rationale: Major 2018-2024 PE wave (Mister Car Wash et al.); membership-model consolidation.

codes.title: Offices of Physical, Occupational and Speech Therapists, and Audiologists
codes.rationale: Documented PT clinic consolidation; physical service with admin AI upside.

codes.title: Offices of Certified Public Accountants
codes.rationale: Current PE wave in CPA firms; high AI exposure with retainer/fixed-fee capture.
codes.expected: high V and C; green-tier if T holds

codes.title: Landscaping Services
codes.rationale: BrightView and successors; fragmentation + route density.
codes.expected: high B; low V; DURABLE; mid-tier

codes.title: Computer Systems Design Services
codes.rationale: MSP roll-up wave (Aventis/Service Leadership data); recurring-revenue capture.
codes.expected: solid across factors; watch T under mature AI

codes.title: Court Reporting and Stenotype Services
codes.rationale: AI transcription replaces the product itself; v2 falsely ranked it Hell-Yes with B=9.
codes.expected: MELTING; capped at Pass regardless of S

codes.title: Telemarketing Bureaus and Other Contact Centers
codes.rationale: AI voice agents replace the service; value flows to AI vendors, not operators.

codes.title: Translation and Interpretation Services
codes.rationale: MT/LLM replaces the core product; residual demand only in certified/legal niches.

codes.title: Travel Agencies
codes.rationale: Melted by the previous technology wave (internet booking) — historical control for the T gate.

codes.title: Photography Studios, Portrait
codes.rationale: Smartphone + generative AI erosion of the paid product.

codes.title: Offices of Real Estate Agents and Brokers
codes.rationale: v2 false positive: Strong verdict despite AI delta −5pp and 'AVOID for roll-up' in its own rationale.
codes.expected: must NOT be green; C and T do the work

codes.title: Portfolio Management and Investment Advice
codes.rationale: v2 #1 with M=9 despite its own multiples implying at most M≈7 — tests mechanical M.
codes.expected: M derived from sourced multiples only; verdict follows

codes.title: Engineering Services
codes.rationale: Existing mechanical fixture (pipeline/runs/541330): cost-plus FAR clawback suppresses C.
